title: sandbox-config v1.0.0
description: Static integrity record for an execution-plane sandbox's configuration files. Published by the airlock release pipeline; consumed by interlock's check-sandbox subcommand and SandboxCheck class. The manifest's combined_hash is the integrity-input source for integrity-inputs/v1.0.0's sandbox_config_hash entry. See README.md for the v1 file set, combined-hash canonicalization, and the open-backend rationale.

manifest_version.description: Locked to the schema directory version. Consumers refuse mismatched values; bumping requires a contract minor or major release.

backend.description: Sandbox backend identifier. Open string (NOT enum) per interlock's interlockSettings.sandbox_backend: the closed Literal was removed so new backends do not require an interlock release. Backend values are conventionally short kebab-case (e.g., 'podman-compose'). See README §Backend convention.

files.description: Map of sandbox config file path to SHA-256 lowercase hex digest of the file's bytes. Paths are relative to the sandbox config root the backend exposes (airlock convention: paths under its infra/sandbox/ tree). check-sandbox re-hashes each file at the matching path and asserts the digest matches; the v1 expected set is listed in README §The v1 file set.

combined_hash.description: SHA-256 lowercase hex of the canonical-bytes serialization of the `files` object (sorted keys, UTF-8, no insignificant whitespace, no trailing newline). This is the value pinned by operators in interlockSettings.sandbox_config_hash; this is also the integrity-input bytes-source for integrity-inputs/v1.0.0's sandbox_config_hash entry. Stable across manifest_version / backend / created_at changes because it covers only the `files` map.

created_at.description: Epoch seconds UTC at which the manifest was published by the airlock release pipeline. Audit-correlation only; does NOT feed combined_hash.
